description: Advanced analytics, reporting, and safe mutations for Zebrunner. 64 tools, 14 resources, 17 prompts.
name: io.github.maksimsarychau/mcp-zebrunner

environmentVariables.description: HTTP server port (required for StreamableHTTP mode)
environmentVariables.name: PORT

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for your Zebrunner instance (e.g., https://your-instance.zebrunner.com)
environmentVariables.name: ZEBRUNNER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: stdio, http, or auto (default: auto)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Authentication mode: headers, oauth, or both (default: headers)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Public URL of this MCP server (for OAuth metadata)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SERVER_URL

title: Advanced Zebrunner MCP Server
